title: Stacksmith Run File
description: Defines a reproducible Stacksmith invocation with layered stack, config, and variable inputs.

merge_mode.description: Merge strategy for layered stacks, configs, and vars. Defaults to `deep`.

stacks.description: Ordered stack definition paths or URLs to deep-merge for single-stack commands, or explicit stack targets for run-all.

configs.description: Ordered tool configuration paths or URLs. Later layers override earlier scalar values while dicts merge recursively and lists append.

vars.description: Ordered vars-file paths or URLs applied before CLI-provided vars layers.

var.description: Inline variable values applied before CLI-provided vars layers. Values may use any YAML-supported type.
